title: Preparation of acid-washed glass coverslips for immunofluorescence microscopy
steps: Add ~20 mL of 1 N HCl; swirl on orbital shaker for 2 h at RT. Room temperature
Remove acid, rinse with 2 x 25 mL PBS until pH is at least 6.0.
Add ~20 mL of 70% EtOH; swirl on orbital shaker for 10 min, RT. Room temperature
Remove ethanol, transfer coverslips to Whatman paper. Let dry in TC hood.
Option 1: Transfer to glass beaker, cover with aluminum foil and autoclave (dry cycle, 30 min sterilization time)
Option 2: Transfer to new sterile 10cm culture dish and turn on UV. Leave in hood until ready for use.
creator: Jenna Ekstrom
